asset.title: App Research Enrich
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The video clearly demonstrates the multi-source research enrichment workflow, showing the transition from pending to complete with real-time trace logs.

featureClarity.evidence: The 'Enrich 4 pending' button action and subsequent row-by-row agent execution clearly show the data enrichment feature.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the entire lifecycle from pending state, active execution, to final completion across all rows.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode spreadsheet layout with a synchronized live trace panel at the bottom.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the NodeRoom paradigm of spreadsheets, agents, and detailed execution traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing realistic data, status changes, and detailed system logs.

legibility.evidence: Main table text is highly legible, though some trace log details are dense and slightly truncated.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for GTM and sales operations workflows requiring automated company enrichment.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the sequential nature of agent execution and lock states without skipping steps.

observedEvidence: Status column transitioning from PENDING to RUNNING to COMPLETE
Research column populating with text summaries
Room trace panel updating dynamically with agent lock/unlock events

defects.observed: Trace log text is dense and wraps tightly, making rapid reading during playback slightly difficult.
defects.fix: Increase line spacing or slightly truncate verbose variable names in the trace UI.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom agents sequentially lock, research, and enrich account profiles with live execution traces.
